mnemonics: My Cats Sleep Much At Night
Mother Can't Store Milk At Night
keyPoints: Array: A collection of elements of the same data type stored in contiguous memory locations.
Stack: A Last-In-First-Out (LIFO) data structure that follows the principle of Last In, First Out.
Queue: A First-In-First-Out (FIFO) data structure where elements are added to the end and removed from the front.
